title: Plastic Bottle
description: Do not give it to turtles. Otherwise, enjoy!
body:
Entry for the One-Texture Vanilla Jam (Hosted on PlanetMinecraft)! This one needs 2 textures because the potion is a separate texture, hope y'all understand.

Adds plastic bottles in place of normal potions. Very cool when you put water in it.

Please do not drop it near turtles.
